# bootstrap-sass vendor source

This directory vendors the npm `bootstrap-sass` package for the unofficial Rancher 1.6 maintenance UI build.

- Upstream package: `bootstrap-sass`
- Upstream version: `3.4.3`
- Upstream tarball: `https://registry.npmjs.org/bootstrap-sass/-/bootstrap-sass-3.4.3.tgz`
- npm integrity: `sha512-vPgFnGMp1jWZZupOND65WS6mkR8rxhJxndT/AcMbqcq1hHMdkcH4sMPhznLzzoHOHkSCrd6J9F8pWBriPCKP2Q==`
- License: MIT, retained in `LICENSE`

The SCSS files may carry maintenance patches for Dart Sass compatibility. Keep protocol/API/UI behavior stable and validate with generated CSS and browser smoke before publishing an artifact.
